name: Rehearsal Dinners
shortDescription: Intimate pre-wedding gatherings with custom menus and the full Coco Maya experience.
heroImageAlt: Elegant table setting for a rehearsal dinner at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego
seoTitle: Rehearsal Dinner Venue in Little Italy San Diego | Coco Maya
seoDescription: Host your rehearsal dinner at Coco Maya in Little Italy, San Diego. Private dining, custom menus, and a coastal setting the night before your wedding.
intro: The night before the wedding deserves its own atmosphere, warm, personal, and a little less formal than the big day. Our private dining room and patio both work well for rehearsal dinners of 15 to 60 guests.
We build a custom menu around your families' preferences and keep the evening moving so toasts, dinner, and conversation all have their moment.

Many couples use the rehearsal dinner to introduce two families for the first time. We keep the room warm and the pacing relaxed, plated or family-style, so the focus stays on the people at the table.

highlights.label: Private Dining Room
highlights.detail: Seats up to 60 guests, with room to extend into patio seating for larger rehearsal dinners.

highlights.label: Custom Multi-Course Menu
highlights.detail: Plated or family-style, built around what both families actually want to eat.

highlights.label: Wine & Cocktail Pairings
highlights.detail: A curated pairing option for a more formal dinner service, if that's the tone you're after.

highlights.label: Space for Toasts
highlights.detail: Room laid out so speeches and toasts have a natural moment, not an awkward interruption.

highlights.label: Planner Coordination
highlights.detail: We work directly with your wedding planner or day-of coordinator on timing and seating.

galleryImageAlt: Lobster flatbread and coastal cuisine served at a Coco Maya rehearsal dinner

gallery.alt: Lobster flatbread served at a Coco Maya rehearsal dinner

atmosphereImageAlt: Coco Maya archway patio setting for an intimate rehearsal dinner
atmosphereLine: Warm light, a table set for toasts, the night before everything changes.

faqs.question: Can Coco Maya accommodate a rehearsal dinner with 50+ guests?
faqs.answer: Yes, our private dining room comfortably holds up to 60 guests, and we can extend into patio space for larger rehearsal dinners.

faqs.question: Do you offer plated or family-style menus?
faqs.answer: Both are available. Many rehearsal dinners choose family-style service to keep the evening relaxed and conversational.

faqs.question: Can we coordinate with our wedding planner directly?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're glad to work directly with your planner or day-of coordinator to align on timing, seating, and any special requests.

faqs.question: Can we do a wine or cocktail pairing for the dinner?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can build a curated wine or cocktail pairing alongside your menu for a more formal rehearsal dinner service.

faqs.question: Is the private dining room fully separated from the rest of the restaurant?
faqs.answer: It's a semi-private space connected to the main venue, giving you a dedicated area for your group while still being part of Coco Maya's atmosphere.
